title: Lizard Keeper
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:LizardKeepers.jpg|thumb|250px]]
{{Quote|Instead, I will make you and your fellow slave Lizard Keepers. It's dangerous work—the Kwi object to their limbs being severed.|[[Zalem/Legends|Zalem]] to [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]|<ref name="Star Wars (1998) 24">[[Star Wars (1998) 24|''Star Wars'' (1998) 24]]</ref>}}
The '''Lizard Keepers''' were slaves of the [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomiri]] witch [[Zalem/Legends|Zalem]]. They were assigned to cut off the paws of the native lizards, the [[Kwi]], which were the key to the [[Infinity Gate]]. Not every [[maleling]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] became a Lizard Keeper, because that job was a very dangerous one. You only became a Lizard Keeper if you were promoted by Zalem herself.

In [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] and the [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] [[Yag Shushin]] were promoted to Lizard Keepers when Quinlan slew a [[Whuffa worm|giant Whuffa]] which was attacking the excavation site.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 24|''Star Wars'' (1998) 24]]
